description: ol-unknown-command (issue #117): a callee that isn't visible (not a Core primitive, reserved word, or declared procedure) raises ol-unknown-command with a Levenshtein did-you-mean suggestion when a visible candidate is within edit distance 2. Uses the parenthesized variadic form `(prnt 5)` so the misspelled zero-arity-unknown callee still parses cleanly (an unrecognized bare callee otherwise falls back to arity 0 and leaves its argument as a stray token, which is itself a parse-stage ol-bad-token, not this rule's concern).
